name: Riishu
description: The Virtuous consort, residing in the Diamond Palace within the inner court. She was sent to be a high consort on the inner court as a young child because her prominent family was aware of the previous Emperor's pedophilic tendencies. When he died, she was allowed to leave as she was never visited by him, but her family arranged for her to return to her high consort position. Due to how young she is, she doesn't get any interest from the current Emperor, commands no respect, nor does she have any influence. She's very naive and gets bullied even by her own attendants.
